title: A permanent residence applicant under the temporary resident to permanent resident pathway needs a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## You need a work permit - A permanent residence applicant under the temporary resident to permanent resident pathway needs a work permit
If you’re applying for permanent residence under the temporary resident to permanent resident pathway, you need a work permit to work in Canada.
You can apply for an open work permit (opens in a new tab) .
How to apply for this work permit

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
